pr.title: Command Center: True Cash metric card and current-month cash flow only
pr.body: ## Summary ### Command Center metrics - Four metric cards: True Cash, Liquid Cash, Credit Card Debt, Current Month Cash Flow (next-month card removed). ### Accounts / Connection hub - Connection hub no longer exposes account edit/disconnect/remove; actions live under Selected Account on Transactions. ### Planning anchor (this update) - **Starting month** is no longer user-configurable. True Cash projections on **Command Center** and **Operations Board** always anchor to the **current calendar month** (live `getCurrentBudgetPeriod()` / `getBudgetPeriodAtOffset(0)`), so there is no backdating UI. - **Starting True Cash** remains editable on Operations Board; Command Center still uses the saved starting true cash with that anchor. - Saving the anchor or creating a new plan year normalizes stored `startingMonth` to the current month; `buildFullYearProjectionSeries` uses the live month for consistency. ## Testing - `npm run lint`
pr.author: Freedomfarms
